wikitext:
{{Sequel Disambiguation}}{{Card Infobox|Dazed||2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Unplayable|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Ethereal|2}}
{{C|Dazed||2}} is an {{KW|Unplayable||2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Common&character:Colorless|Common|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Status&character:Colorless|Status|2}} Card. 

== Sources ==
* {{C|Boost Away||2}} adds a {{C|Dazed||2}} to the player's discard pile.
* {{R|Blessed Antler||2}} adds 2 {{C|Dazed||2}} to the player's draw pile after they've finished drawing their opening hand for the start of combat.

The following enemies can give the player {{C|Dazed||2}}:
* {{M|Eye With Teeth||2}}
** {{Int|Eye With Teeth|Distract||2}} - Adds 3 {{C|Dazed||2}} to your discard pile.
* {{M|Skulking Colony||2}}
** {{Int|Skulking Colony|Smash||2}} - Adds 4 {{C|Dazed||2}} to your discard pile.
* {{M|Chomper||2}}
** {{Int|Chomper|Screech||2}} - Adds 3 {{C|Dazed||2}} to your discard pile.
* {{M|Entomancer||2}} - Starts with 1 {{BD|Personal Hive||2}}.
** {{Int|Entomancer|Pheromone Spit||2}} - Gains 1 {{BD|Personal Hive||2}}. (Max 3)
** {{BD|Personal Hive||2}} - Whenever this enemy is hit by an Attack, add X {{C|Dazed||2}} into your Draw Pile.
* {{M|Noisebot||2}}
** {{Int|Noisebot|Noise||2}} - Adds 2 {{C|Dazed||2}} to your draw pile and 2 to your discard pile

== Interactions ==
=== Synergies ===
As {{C|Dazed||2}} is a {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Status&character:Colorless|Status|2}} card it interacts with the following:
* {{C|Compact||2}} will convert it into {{C|Fuel||2}}.
* {{C|Iteration||2}} will draw 2 cards when it is drawn if it is the first {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Status&character:Colorless|Status|2}} card drawn that turn.
* {{C|Flak Cannon||2}} will {{KW|Exhaust|exhaust|2}} it to deal damage.

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Dazed to the game.
